user_stories:
As a Customer Support Representative, I want the Email Ingestion System to seamlessly integrate with email services via SMTP, IMAP, and RESTful APIs so that I can efficiently retrieve and process incoming emails in real-time, reducing my workload on routine inquiries.

As an IT Administrator, I want the Message Classification Module to utilize LLM-based classifiers to analyze email content and assign confidence scores so that I can ensure accurate and timely routing of emails to the appropriate recipients, improving overall operational efficiency.

As a Subject Matter Expert (SME), I want the Knowledge Base Integration to continuously update with new information from resolved inquiries so that I can access the most up-to-date organizational knowledge when responding to complex inquiries, enhancing the quality of my responses.

As a Customer Support Representative, I want the Response Generation Engine to deploy a RAG system for generating contextually accurate responses with an approval workflow so that I can quickly review and edit automated responses before dispatch, ensuring consistency and accuracy in customer communications.

As an IT Administrator, I want the Routing Logic to develop a rules-based engine for assigning emails to appropriate SMEs based on content analysis so that I can streamline the process of directing complex inquiries to the right experts, reducing response times and improving resolution accuracy.

As a Subject Matter Expert (SME), I want the User Interface to provide a comprehensive dashboard for monitoring system performance and configuration options so that I can easily track response metrics, manage the knowledge base, and intervene manually when necessary, ensuring efficient handling of inquiries.
features:
Development Plan for Email Router Product Features:

1. Feature: Email Ingestion System
   - Description: Seamless integration with email services via SMTP, IMAP, and RESTful APIs for real-time email retrieval and preprocessing to extract metadata and content.
   - Key Functionality: Connect to designated email services, extract sender, recipient, subject, and timestamp information from incoming emails.
   - User Benefit: Enables quick and efficient processing of incoming emails, ensuring timely responses and accurate handling of customer inquiries.

2. Feature: Message Classification Module
   - Description: Utilizes LLM-based classifiers to analyze email content, determine intent, and assign confidence scores for automated or manual handling.
   - Key Functionality: Analyze email content, classify intent and category, assign confidence scores for decision-making.
   - User Benefit: Improves email triage efficiency, ensures emails are routed to the right recipients promptly, and reduces manual handling errors.

3. Feature: Knowledge Base Integration
   - Description: Implements a vector database for storing organizational knowledge and continuous learning from resolved inquiries.
   - Key Functionality: Efficient storage and retrieval of organizational knowledge, updating the knowledge base with new information.
   - User Benefit: Ensures consistent and accurate responses to inquiries, reduces response time, and enhances overall communication quality.

4. Feature: Response Generation Engine
   - Description: Deploys a RAG system to generate contextually accurate responses with an approval workflow for review and editing.
   - Key Functionality: Generates draft responses for routine inquiries, provides interface for human review and approval.
   - User Benefit: Streamlines response generation process, ensures responses are accurate, consistent, and aligned with organizational messaging standards.

5. Feature: Routing Logic
   - Description: Develops rules-based engine for assigning emails to appropriate SMEs based on content analysis and context-aware forwarding.
   - Key Functionality: Routes complex inquiries to the right SMEs, includes relevant metadata and previous correspondence history.
   - User Benefit: Ensures inquiries are directed to the most qualified experts, reduces response time, and enhances resolution accuracy.

6. Feature: User Interface
   - Description: Creates a comprehensive dashboard for monitoring system performance, configuration panel for managing knowledge base, routing rules, and system settings.
   - Key Functionality: Displays performance metrics, offers configuration options, allows manual intervention when necessary.
   - User Benefit: Provides visibility into system performance, facilitates easy management of system settings, and allows human oversight for critical inquiries.

By focusing on these key product features, the Email Router system aims to streamline email management processes, reduce response times, improve routing accuracy, enhance consistency in communication, and ultimately increase operational efficiency and customer satisfaction.
